stories.description: Plain-Language Labels, Feature Flags, and DEMO_MODE Hardening

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: All 13 navigation labels in App.tsx `categories[]` array match the renamed values specified in the Changes table, verified by unit test asserting each label string

`config/features.ts` exports a `features` object with 5 boolean keys (`simulateActions`, `apiTester`, `seedSystem`, `injectRecord`, `debugPanels`) that return `true` when `import.meta.env.DEV` is true and `false` otherwise, verified by unit test

`DEMO_MODE` in `services/firebase.ts` includes `import.meta.env.MODE !== 'production'` in its condition AND a production guard that throws an Error if `import.meta.env.PROD && DEMO_MODE`, verified by unit test

CompanyProfile.tsx contains zero instances of ANY of these strings: "Authority DNA", "Logic Seed", "Identity Matrix", "Duty Cockpit", "Global Authority Profile", "Synchronize Matrix", "Terminate Duty Cycle", "Cargo Unit Telemetry", "Active Duty Engine", "Terminal Nodes", "Authority Structure", "Load Numbering Matrix", "Access Decision Matrix", "Acknowledge Exit", "Duty Cycle Terminated", "Legal Entity Entity", "Establishing Authority Connection", "Personnel Registry", "Hierarchy Permissions", "Compliance Governance", "Financial Protocols", "Secure File Download", "Authority Global State Synchronized", "Initial Duty Acknowledge", "Finalizing Cargo", "Operational DNA", "Authority ID", verified by grep returning 0 matches across ALL listed strings
DriverMobileHome.tsx contains zero instances of "TruckLogix", "Fleet Connect", "Standby Mode Initialized", "Sign Out Authority", verified by grep returning 0 matches
Dashboard.tsx contains zero instances of "Unified Command Center", "Strategy & Analytics", "Master Triage Feed", "Functional Response Queues", "Fleet Situational Awareness", verified by grep
ExceptionConsole.tsx contains zero instances of "Master Triage Console", "Unified Exception Management", "View 360", "SLA targets are within safe margins", verified by grep
LoadBoardEnhanced.tsx contains zero instances of "SQL Matrix View", "Manifest #", "Yield" (as a column label), "IFTA INTEL", "Grid Visibility", "View Tailoring", verified by grep
GlobalMapViewEnhanced.tsx contains zero instances of "Execute Intervention", "RED CIRCLED", "Regional Intelligence", "Operational Weather", verified by grep

NetworkPortal.tsx contains zero instances of "Registry PK", "A/P Engine", "Constraint Sets", "Commercial Catalog", "Operational freedom enabled", "authorized personnel registered for this node", "Compliance vault is empty", verified by grep
CommandCenterView.tsx contains zero instances of "Attachment protocol", "operational target", "Operations Rack", "Triage Inbox", "Asset recovery team activated", verified by grep
SafetyView.tsx contains zero instances of "Custody Events", "Service Tickets In Matrix", verified by grep
QuoteManager.tsx contains zero instances of "Queue Empty", verified by grep
CustomerPortalView.tsx contains zero instances of "Voyage Progress", "Tracking Master-ID", verified by grep

All 15 root dev scripts exist in `scripts/dev/` and zero `.cjs`/`.js` dev scripts remain in the project root (excluding node_modules, config files like vite.config.ts, tailwind.config.js, postcss.config.js), verified by ls
All 23 server dev scripts exist in `scripts/dev/server/` and zero seed_*/test_*/migrate_exceptions*/upgrade_*/check_billing*/check_db*/repair_* scripts remain in `server/` root, verified by ls

gateCmds.unit: cd "F:/Trucking/DisbatchMe" && npx vitest run src/__tests__/config/features.test.ts src/__tests__/services/firebase.test.ts src/__tests__/components/App.navigation.test.tsx src/__tests__/components/CompanyProfile.test.tsx src/__tests__/components/DriverMobileHome.labels.test.tsx src/__tests__/components/Dashboard.labels.test.tsx src/__tests__/components/ExceptionConsole.labels.test.tsx src/__tests__/components/LoadBoardEnhanced.labels.test.tsx src/__tests__/components/GlobalMapViewEnhanced.labels.test.tsx src/__tests__/components/NetworkPortal.labels.test.tsx src/__tests__/components/CommandCenterView.labels.test.tsx src/__tests__/components/SafetyView.labels.test.tsx src/__tests__/components/QuoteManager.labels.test.tsx src/__tests__/components/CustomerPortalView.labels.test.tsx --reporter=verbose

stories.description: Remove Dev Artifacts from Production UI

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: IntelligenceHub SIMULATE ActionGroup is not rendered when `features.simulateActions` is `false`, verified by unit test that mocks `features.simulateActions = false` and asserts "SIMULATE" label is absent from the DOM
App.tsx does not render the `api-tester` navigation item or `GoogleMapsAPITester` component when `features.apiTester` is `false`, verified by unit test
App.tsx does not call `seedDatabase()` when `features.seedSystem` is `false`, verified by unit test with mock spy on seedDatabase
IntelligenceHub "Inject Record" action is not rendered when `features.injectRecord` is `false`, verified by unit test
IntelligenceHub "Work" ActionGroup label reads "Quick Actions", verified by unit test DOM text assertion

stories.description: Replace Hardcoded Mock Data with Real Calculations or Empty States

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: `EmptyState` component renders an icon, title, description, and optional action button, verified by unit test asserting all elements present in the DOM

`AnalyticsDashboard.tsx` contains zero instances of "Global Logistics", "FastTrack Freight", "Blue Sky Carriers", "Midwest Brokerage", "Chicago, IL -> Detroit, MI", "4.2% increase in Midwest reefer demand", verified by grep returning 0 matches
`AnalyticsDashboard` renders EmptyState with message containing "completed loads" when given an empty loads array, verified by unit test

`AnalyticsDashboard` calculates RPM as `carrierRate / totalMiles` from real load data when given 10+ loads with known values, verified by unit test asserting displayed value matches expected calculation

`Dashboard.tsx` contains zero instances of "$2.45", "72% Done", "14 missing receipts", "412 mi", "Insurance Expiry", "12 days", "Broker Logistics Group", "94%", "SLA: 14m", verified by grep returning 0 matches
`CustomerPortalView.tsx` contains zero instances of "INV-8409", "$4,250.00", "TRK-491", "Syracuse, NY", "142 Miles", "78% Complete", "4h 32m", verified by grep returning 0 matches
`CustomerPortalView` renders EmptyState with "No invoices" message when given zero delivered loads, verified by unit test

`CustomerPortalView` quote form submit button either calls `onSubmitQuote` callback with form data OR the form is replaced with a "Contact dispatch" message — the submit button MUST NOT exist as a no-op, verified by unit test that clicks submit and asserts either callback is called or "Contact" text is visible
`DriverMobileHome.tsx` contains zero instances of "Wait time expected: 2h" and "Check in at Gate 2", verified by grep
`DriverMobileHome` renders `selectedLoad.specialInstructions` when present (test with load that has specialInstructions="Dock 7", assert "Dock 7" appears), verified by unit test

`GlobalMapViewEnhanced.tsx` contains zero instances of `seed % 10` or `seed %` patterns used to generate fake isOnline/lastPing/heading data, verified by grep returning 0 matches for `seed %` in the file
`LoadBoardEnhanced` renders EmptyState with "No loads" message and a CTA button when given an empty loads array, verified by unit test
`CalendarView` renders EmptyState with "No loads scheduled" message when given an empty loads array, verified by unit test
`Toast` component renders a message string, auto-dismisses after the specified duration (default 3000ms), and applies green/red/blue styling based on type prop, verified by unit test
Tapping the "Upload" button on DriverMobileHome's document checklist opens a Scanner modal overlay, verified by integration test that simulates click and asserts Scanner component is rendered
When Scanner calls `onDataExtracted`, the document metadata is passed to `onSaveLoad` with the updated load, verified by integration test with onSaveLoad spy

All body text in DriverMobileHome uses `text-xs` (12px) or larger -- zero instances of `text-[8px]`, `text-[9px]`, or `text-[10px]` remain for content text, verified by grep on the component file returning 0 matches for `text-[8px]`, `text-[9px]`, `text-[10px]`
After a successful status update, a Toast with "Status updated to {status}" and type="success" appears, verified by unit test
After a failed status update, a Toast with "Failed to update status" and type="error" appears, verified by unit test
A "Message Dispatch" button is visible on Today tab when `activeLoads.length > 0`, clicking it calls `onOpenHub('messaging')`, verified by unit test
A phone icon button with `tel:` link is visible when company dispatch phone is available, verified by unit test
On component mount, `activeTab` and `selectedLoadId` are restored from localStorage keys `driver_{user.id}_activeTab` and `driver_{user.id}_selectedLoadId`, verified by unit test
On tab change, the new tab value is written to localStorage key `driver_{user.id}_activeTab`, verified by unit test

stories.description: Architecture Polish -- Console.log Cleanup, Trucking Glossary, and Test Credential Extraction

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: `utils/logger.ts` exports a `log` object where `log.info` is a no-op when `import.meta.env.DEV` is false and passes through to `console.log` when true, verified by unit test
`storageService.ts` contains zero `console.log()` calls, verified by grep returning 0 matches

`services/authService.ts`, `services/brokerService.ts`, `components/Auth.tsx`, `components/GlobalMapViewEnhanced.tsx` contain zero `console.log()` calls, verified by grep across all 4 files returning 0 matches

`data/truckingGlossary.ts` exports a glossary object with at least 25 entries including IFTA, BOL, POD, RPM, HOS, ELD, MC, DOT, TONU, LUMPER, DETENTION, DEADHEAD, ACCESSORIAL, verified by unit test counting keys and checking specific entries
`GlossaryTooltip` component renders a tooltip with the definition text when hovering over a known term, and renders children without a tooltip for unknown terms, verified by unit test
Zero `console.log()` calls exist in any `.ts` or `.tsx` file under `services/` or `components/` directories (excluding test files and node_modules), verified by grep returning 0 matches

`services/authService.ts` seedDatabase() function contains zero hardcoded email addresses or passwords (no "admin@loadpilot.com", no "admin123", no "dispatch@loadpilot.com", no "dispatch123"), verified by grep returning 0 matches for these strings in authService.ts
`fixtures/test-users.json` exists and is listed in `.gitignore`, verified by file existence check and gitignore grep
